description: Create packages/information-agents - proactive intelligence with topic monitoring, price watchers, event-aware suggestions, and Universal Cart. This is a new package in the monorepo.
steps: 1. Create packages/information-agents/package.json (name: @quant/information-agents, same pattern as generative-media devDependencies + scripts).
2. Create packages/information-agents/tsconfig.json (composite, ES2022, outDir dist, rootDir src, vitest/globals types).

4. Create packages/information-agents/src/types.ts with types: AgentType ('news-monitor'|'price-watcher'|'event-suggester'|'cart-aggregator'), InformationAgent (id, type, config, status, lastRun), MonitorConfig (topics: string[], sources: string[], frequency, filters), WatchTarget (name, url, targetPrice?, condition), PriceAlert (targetId, currentPrice, targetPrice, triggered, timestamp), EventSuggestion (eventId, title, reason, relevanceScore, suggestedAction), CartItem (id, name, source, price, url, availability, addedAt), UniversalCart (id, userId, items, totalEstimate, sources), CartSource (name, searchUrl, apiEndpoint).

5. Create packages/information-agents/src/agents/news-monitor.ts - NewsMonitorAgent class: configure(topics, sources, frequency), check() -> NewsItem[], getDigest(since: number) -> NewsDigest with summarized items grouped by topic.

6. Create packages/information-agents/src/agents/price-watcher.ts - PriceWatcherAgent class: addWatch(target: WatchTarget), removeWatch(targetId), checkPrices() -> PriceAlert[], getWatches() -> WatchTarget[].

7. Create packages/information-agents/src/agents/event-suggester.ts - EventSuggesterAgent class: analyze(calendar, preferences) -> EventSuggestion[], configure(interests, location), getSuggestions(date: number) -> EventSuggestion[].

8. Create packages/information-agents/src/cart/universal-cart.ts - UniversalCart class: addItem(item: CartItem), removeItem(itemId), search(query, sources: CartSource[]) -> CartItem[] (aggregate from multiple sources), getCart(userId) -> Cart, checkout() -> { redirectUrls: Map<source, url> } (group by source for multi-checkout).

9. Create packages/information-agents/src/cart/cart-sources.ts - define CartSource configs for common platforms (Amazon, eBay, Walmart, etc.) with mock search implementations. Export getAvailableSources(), searchSource(source, query) -> CartItem[].

10. Create packages/information-agents/src/scheduler.ts - AgentScheduler class: register(agent: InformationAgent), run(agentId) -> results, runAll() -> Map<agentId, results>, getSchedule() -> next run times.
11. Create packages/information-agents/src/index.ts exporting all: types, NewsMonitorAgent, PriceWatcherAgent, EventSuggesterAgent, UniversalCart, AgentScheduler, cart sources.
12. Create packages/information-agents/src/__tests__/news-monitor.test.ts - test topic configuration, check returns items, digest groups by topic.
13. Create packages/information-agents/src/__tests__/price-watcher.test.ts - test add/remove watches, price alert triggering when below target.
14. Create packages/information-agents/src/__tests__/universal-cart.test.ts - test add/remove items, multi-source search aggregation, checkout URL generation.

15. Run: source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && pnpm install && pnpm typecheck --filter=@quant/information-agents && pnpm test --filter=@quant/information-agents
acceptance_criteria: Package compiles cleanly with tsc --noEmit in strict mode
NewsMonitorAgent tracks topics and produces digests
PriceWatcherAgent triggers alerts when prices hit targets
UniversalCart aggregates items across sources with multi-checkout
AgentScheduler registers and runs agents on schedule
All tests pass via vitest run
verification: source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && pnpm install && pnpm typecheck --filter=@quant/information-agents
source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && pnpm test --filter=@quant/information-agents
